settings.title: Settings
settings.header_image_hint: An optional image displayed at the top of every page. JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP — max {size}.
settings.business_email_hint: This email will be included in webhook notifications and used as the reply-to address for automated emails.
settings.payment_provider_hint: Choose which payment provider to use for paid listings.
settings.stripe.heading: Stripe Settings
settings.stripe.configured_hint: A Stripe secret key is currently configured. Enter a new key below to replace it.
settings.stripe.not_configured_hint: No Stripe key is configured. Enter your Stripe secret key to enable Stripe payments.
settings.stripe.test_mode_warning: Test mode: You are using a Stripe test key (sk_test_). No real charges will be made. Switch to a live key (sk_live_) when you are ready to accept real payments.
settings.stripe.live_mode_warning: Live mode: You are using a Stripe live key. Payments will be charged for real.
settings.square.heading: Square Settings
settings.square.configured_hint: A Square access token is currently configured. Enter new credentials below to replace them.
settings.square.not_configured_hint: No Square access token is configured. Enter your Square credentials to enable Square payments.
settings.square.webhook_instructions: To receive payment notifications, set up a webhook in your Square Developer Dashboard:
settings.square.webhook_configured_hint: A webhook signature key is currently configured. Enter a new key below to replace it.
settings.square.webhook_not_configured_h: No webhook signature key is configured. Follow the steps above to set one up.
settings.booking_fee_hint: Percentage fee added at checkout (e.g. 1.5 for 1.5%). Set to 0 to disable. Max 10.
settings.embed_hosts: Only allow embedding on these hosts
settings.embed_hosts_hint: Restrict which websites can embed your booking forms in an iframe. Leave blank to allow embedding from any site.
settings.embed_hosts_wildcard_hint: Use *.example.com to allow all subdomains. Direct visits to the booking page are always allowed.
settings.terms_hint: If set, users must agree to these terms before reserving tickets.
settings.terms_placeholder: Enter terms and conditions that attendees must agree to before registering. Leave blank to disable.
settings.change_password_hint: Changing your password will log you out of all sessions.
settings.show_public_site_hint: When enabled, the homepage will show a public website with navigation for Home, Listings, T&Cs and Contact pages.
settings.theme_hint: Choose between light and dark themes for the site interface.
settings.underline_links_hint: Underline links everywhere, including the navigation. When off, links show in colour only and gain an underline on hover or focus.
settings.advanced_link: For advanced settings including public API, Apple Wallet, custom email templates, mail provider, timezone, custom domain, and database reset, click here.
settings.debug_link: For nerdy debug info click here.
settings.advanced.title: Advanced Settings
settings.advanced.warning: Be careful changing settings on this page. You can break your site in ways that can be hard to diagnose. Test your booking process after making a change.
settings.advanced.public_api_hint: Exposes a JSON API for listing listings, checking availability, and creating bookings. See the API guide for details.
settings.advanced.apple_wallet_hint: Configure Apple Wallet pass signing to show an 'Add to Apple Wallet' button on ticket pages.
settings.advanced.google_wallet_hint: Configure Google Wallet to show an 'Add to Google Wallet' button on ticket pages. Requires a Google Cloud service account with the Google Wallet API enabled.
settings.advanced.confirmation_email_hin: Customise the registration confirmation email sent to attendees. Uses Liquid template syntax. Leave blank to use the default template.
settings.advanced.admin_notification_ema: Customise the notification email sent to the business email when a registration comes in. Leave blank to use the default template.
settings.advanced.subject: Subject
settings.advanced.leave_blank_default: Leave blank to use default template
settings.advanced.email_notifications_hi: Send confirmation emails to attendees and admin notifications when registrations come in.
settings.advanced.custom_domain_hint: Set a custom domain for your booking site.
settings.advanced.domain_not_validated: Your custom domain is not yet validated. It will not work until validation is complete.
settings.advanced.domain_cname_instructi: To use your custom domain, create a CNAME record:
settings.advanced.domain_dns_hint: Once the DNS record is in place, click the button below to validate and enable SSL.
settings.advanced.database_reset.heading: Reset Database
settings.advanced.database_reset.warning: Warning: This will permanently delete all listings, attendees, settings, and other data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.advanced.database_reset.confirm: To reset the database, type the following phrase into the box below:
The site will be fully reset and all data will be lost.
settings.column_order.label: Column order
settings.column_order.listing_desc: Control which columns appear on the Listings table and in what order. Use Liquid-style tags separated by commas. See the Column Order guide for full details including custom date and currency formatting.
settings.column_order.attendee_desc: Control which columns appear on Attendee tables and in what order. Use Liquid-style tags separated by commas. Columns referencing absent data (e.g. email when no attendees have one) are hidden automatically. See the Column Order guide for full details including custom date and currency formatting.
settings.domain_warning.title: Changing your domain changes your payment webhook URL.
settings.domain_warning.body: Your payment provider sends booking confirmations to a webhook at your current domain. After you change or set your domain here, you must update your webhook or new payments will stop being confirmed:
settings.domain_warning.square: In your Square Developer Dashboard, update your webhook subscription's Notification URL to the new address, then paste the Signature Key back into the Square settings.
settings.domain_warning.stripe: Re-save your key on the Stripe settings page to point the webhook at the new domain.
settings.subdomain.heading: Host Subdomain
settings.subdomain.intro: You can choose a prettier domain name for your tickets site. Enter a subdomain into the box below to preview the full URL — you can change your mind before saving, but once set this cannot be changed. Learn more.
settings.subdomain.also_custom: You can also set a custom domain below.
settings.subdomain.permanent: This subdomain is permanent and cannot be changed.
settings.superuser.heading: Superuser Recovery
settings.superuser.activated: Superuser {username} is already activated. You can delete them from your users page.
settings.superuser.intro: Your attendee data is encrypted with your password, and admins cannot view your password. With that in mind, please select:
settings.superuser.self_managed: I understand that my attendee information cannot be decrypted without my password, and that I am responsible for storing my password securely. If I forget it, I will be locked out of my attendee records.
settings.superuser.enable_super: I wish to enable a "super user" account on this platform for my admin, {email}. This user will be able to log in, decrypt attendee data, and invite a replacement owner account if I lose access.
settings.sumup.heading: SumUp Settings
